description: Configure GPredict for a two-observatory satellite avoidance network by managing modules and ground stations. Delete the obsolete 'OldTracker' module while ensuring the 'Amateur' module remains unchanged. Add ground stations for Lowell Observatory (35.2029 N, 111.6646 W, 2210 meters) and McDonald Observatory (30.6716 N, 104.0217 W, 2070 meters). Create a tracking module named 'Lowell_Avoidance' assigned to the Lowell ground station tracking ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544), CSS (TIANHE) (NORAD 48274), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), and SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849). Create a second tracking module named 'McDonald_Avoidance' assigned to the McDonald ground station tracking ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544), CSS (TIANHE) (NORAD 48274), NOAA 18 (NORAD 28654), and DMSP 5D-3 F18 / USA 210 (NORAD 35951). Configure GPredict preferences to display UTC time for all timestamps. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
